upstream.name: misode/misode.github.io
upstream.includedContent: Generator catalog metadata extracted from src/config.json.

entries.title: Misode generator catalog overview
entries.summary: Generated catalog of vanilla datapack and resource-pack generator ids, version bounds, path rules, and wiki references derived from misode config.json.

entries.title: Misode Minecraft version matrix
entries.summary: Version ids, upstream refs, dynamic flags, and pack_format values used by misode generators.
